texto: An agnostic found himself in trouble and a friend suggested he pray. "How can I pray when I do not know whether or not there is a God?" he asked. "If you are lost in the forest " his friend replied "you do not wait until you find someone before shouting for help."
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dan Plies que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “An agnostic found himself in trouble and a friend suggested he pray. "How can I pray when I do no…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, prayer, friend, com foco em termino e reflexao.
